message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.abs (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering DataFrame.abs():

- abs_basic: 3-row 2-col frame with mixed positive/negative floats —
  every cell becomes its absolute value while column dtypes are
  preserved.

The test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.abs() and emits expected_frame), runs the Rust DataFrame.abs(),
and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameAbs was
already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-7n4wc]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
